training_status: sedentary during cycle (stopped going to gym)

benefits.description: Feels full after small meals; reduced food noise occasionally
Significant weight/fat loss — describes looking very skinny

side_effects.description: Tired and weak, no motivation to go to the gym
Significant muscle loss due to not exercising or eating properly
Pronounced inguinal lymph nodes — visible, not painful, still mobile
No nausea reported; stated nausea was the only side effect known to others doing same protocol

protocol_notes: Microdosing 1.5mg once weekly for 10 weeks. Stopping due to excessive muscle loss and appearance concerns. Did not exercise or eat properly during the cycle. Many others on same protocol reportedly only experienced nausea.
